description_long: This is a narrow, multi-story apartment building with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a mix of wood-textured and white exterior surfaces. The building has five visible floors, each with large rectangular windows arranged in a regular vertical pattern. The rooftop includes a terrace with railings, potted plants, and utility structures, suggesting communal or private outdoor space. Balconies with glass or metal railings are present on the upper floors, adding to the building's contemporary aesthetic. The ground floor has a recessed entrance area with a single door and some greenery, while the building is set adjacent to a paved urban street. The overall structure is tall and slender, optimized for dense urban environments.
description: A tall, narrow modern apartment building with wood and white facades, large windows, balconies, and a rooftop terrace, set beside an urban street.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wood-textured facade, stacked windows, and a rooftop terrace with visible railings and plants.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, white facade, and the alignment of windows and balconies above the door.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with more wood paneling, additional windows, and a visible corner balcony with plants.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a mix of white and wood surfaces, more greenery, and the rooftop terrace from another angle.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a regular, vertical stack on each floor, with consistent spacing and alignment, contributing to a symmetrical and orderly facade.
